headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero headings, and card titles. Tight tracking (-0.02em).

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, inputs, and UI elements. Normal tracking.

mono.usage: Use for code snippets, technical specs, or decorative 'tech' labels.

containers.card_style: bg-card border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/20 transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary/20 text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 h-11 px-8 rounded-full font-medium

cards.service_card: p-8 rounded-2xl bg-white border border-slate-100 hover:border-violet-200 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-violet-500/5 transition-all group

inputs.style: h-12 rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-violet-500 focus:ring-violet-500/20 bg-white

hero_abstract.usage: Hero section background or side visual

home.hero: Split layout. Left: Bold H1 'Digital Excellence for Modern Business', Subtext, CTA. Right: Abstract 3D/Geometric Violet visual.
home.services_preview: 3-column grid of cards. Icons in violet circles. Hover effect: Card lifts, border turns violet.
home.testimonials: Carousel with client logos below. Use 'Marquee' effect for logos.

services.layout: Detailed list view or alternating zig-zag layout (Text Left/Image Right, then swap).
services.icons: Use Lucide-React icons with violet stroke.

products.layout: Pricing-table style comparison or Grid of Product Cards with 'Get Started' buttons.
products.highlight: Highlight 'Best Value' products with a violet border and 'Popular' badge.

contact.layout: Two columns. Left: Contact Info + Map. Right: Form (Shadcn Form).
contact.form_style: Clean, minimal labels. Violet submit button.

admin.layout: Sidebar navigation (Dark Violet). Main content area (Light Gray).
admin.dashboard: Stats cards at top. Recent activity table below. Use Recharts for data viz (Violet lines/bars).

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-12, p-24).
All interactive elements must have hover states.
Use 'Manrope' for all headings to ensure brand consistency.
Primary color is Violet (hsl(265, 80%, 50%)). Do not use Blue.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (WCAG AA).
